text.title: client-conventions-reverse-engineering Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the lint/formatter config sufficient to cover naming + layering?

conclusion.verdict: extract-only; skip inference; guardrail mirrors lint config
extract + infer; merge both into the guardrail
expand sample before inferring; do not ship a guardrail from < 20 PRs
